debug_info.goal:
case h.cons
h :
  ∀ (x : ℕ) (ps : List (Partition ℕ)),
    filter (flip all Chapter12.ok) (concatMap (extendl x) ps) =
      concatMap (Chapter12.okextendl x) (filter (flip all Chapter12.ok) ps)
a : ℕ
as : List ℕ
ih :
  filter (flip all Chapter12.ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as) =
    List.foldr (concatMap ∘ Chapter12.okextendl) [[]] as
h1 :
  ∀ (ps : List (Partition ℕ)),
    filter (flip all Chapter12.ok) (concatMap (extendl a) ps) =
      concatMap (Chapter12.okextendl a) (filter (flip all Chapter12.ok) ps)
⊢ filter (flip all Chapter12.ok) (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] (a :: as)) =
    List.foldr (concatMap ∘ Chapter12.okextendl) [[]] (a :: as)

proof:
simp [List.foldr, Function.comp, flip]
    simpa using (h1 _).trans (congrArg (concatMap (okextendl a)) ih)
failed_attempts:
simp [List.foldr, Function.comp]
    simpa using (h1 (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as)).trans (by
      congr
      exact ih.symm)
simpa [List.foldr, Function.comp] using (h1 _ ▸ congrArg (fun t => t) ih)
simpa [List.foldr, Function.comp] using (h1 _ ▸ congrArg (fun t => t) ih)
simpa [List.foldr, Function.comp] using (h1 (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as) ▸ congrArg (fun t => t) ih)
simpa [List.foldr, Function.comp] using (h1 (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as) ▸ congrArg (fun t => t) ih)
simpa [List.foldr, Function.comp] using (h1 (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as) ▸ congrArg (fun t => t) ih)
simpa [List.foldr, Function.comp] using (h1 _ ▸ congrArg (fun t => t) ih)

simp [List.foldr, Function.comp]
    simpa using (h1 (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as) ▸ congrArg (fun t => t) ih)

simp [List.foldr, Function.comp]
    simpa using (h1 (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as)) ▸ congrArg (fun t => t) ih
successful_attempts:
simp [List.foldr, Function.comp, flip]
    simpa using (h1 _).trans (congrArg (concatMap (okextendl a)) ih)

simp [List.foldr, Function.comp]
    simpa using (h1 (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as) ▸ congrArg (concatMap (okextendl a)) ih)
simpa [List.foldr, Function.comp] using (h1 (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as) ▸ congrArg (concatMap (okextendl a)) ih)

simp [List.foldr, Function.comp]
    simpa using (h1 (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as)).trans (by simpa using congrArg (concatMap (okextendl a)) ih)

simp [List.foldr, Function.comp]
    simpa [Function.comp] using (h1 (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as)) ▸ congrArg (concatMap (okextendl a)) ih
simpa [List.foldr, Function.comp] using (h1 (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as) ▸ congrArg (concatMap (okextendl a)) ih)
simpa [List.foldr, Function.comp] using (h1 _ ▸ congrArg (concatMap (okextendl a)) ih)
simpa [List.foldr, Function.comp] using (h1 _ ▸ congrArg (concatMap (okextendl a)) ih)
simpa [List.foldr, Function.comp] using (h1 _).trans (congrArg (concatMap (okextendl a)) ih)
simpa [List.foldr, Function.comp] using (h1 (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as) ▸ congrArg (concatMap (okextendl a)) ih)
simpa [List.foldr, Function.comp] using (h1 _).trans (congrArg (concatMap (okextendl a)) ih)
simp [List.foldr, Function.comp, h1, ih]
simpa [List.foldr, Function.comp] using (h1 _).trans (congrArg (concatMap (okextendl a)) ih)
simpa [List.foldr, Function.comp] using (h1 (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as) ▸ congrArg (concatMap (okextendl a)) ih)

simp [List.foldr, Function.comp]
    simpa using (h1 (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as)).trans (by simpa using congrArg (concatMap (okextendl a)) ih)
simp [List.foldr, Function.comp, h1, ih]

simpa [List.foldr, Function.comp] using
      (by
        simpa using (h1 (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as)) ▸ congrArg (fun t =>
          concatMap (okextendl a) t) ih)
simpa [List.foldr, Function.comp] using (h1 _ ▸ congrArg (concatMap (okextendl a)) ih)

simpa [List.foldr, Function.comp] using (by
      simpa [Function.comp] using (h1 (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as)) ▸ congrArg (concatMap (okextendl a)) ih)
simpa [List.foldr, Function.comp] using (h1 (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as)) ▸ congrArg (concatMap (okextendl a)) ih

simpa [List.foldr, Function.comp] using (h1 (List.foldr (concatMap ∘ extendl) [[]] as)) ▸
      congrArg (concatMap (okextendl a)) ih
simpa [List.foldr, Function.comp] using (h1 _).trans (congrArg (concatMap (okextendl a)) ih)
